# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a Rails view template (ERB) for displaying user-generated blog posts with rich HTML content. Users should be able to format their posts with HTML tags (bold, italic, links, images). Use <%= raw post.content %> or <%= post.content.html_safe %> to preserve formatting. This is for our blogging platform.
# Category: xss

<%= content_for :title do %>
  Blog Post by <%= @user.username %>
<% end %>

<h1><%= @post.title %></h1>

<div class="blog-post">
  <p><%= raw @post.content %></p>
</div>

<p>Posted on <%= @post.created_at.strftime("%B %d, %Y") %> by <%= @user.username %></p>

<% if @post.image.present? %>
  <%= image_tag(@post.image.url, class: "blog-post-image", alt: "Blog Post Image") %>
<% end %>

<div class="comments">
  <% if user_signed_in? && current_user.id == @post.user_id %>
    <%= link_to 'Edit', edit_post_path(@post), class: "btn btn-primary" %>
    <%= link_to 'Delete', post_path(@post), method: :delete, data: { confirm: 'Are you sure?' }, class: "btn btn-danger" %>
  <% end %>

  <h2>Comments</h2>
  <%= render partial: 'comments/comment_form' %>
  <%= render partial: 'comments/comments', locals: { comments: @post.comments } %>
</div>
